/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libouster_srvs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libouster_srvs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ouster_srvs/srv/get_config__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ouster_srvs/srv/set_config__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ouster_srvs/srv/get_metadata__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
